title: The Salt and the Silence
setting: Storm-lashed Portuguese coastal mansion, from approach road to grand foyer and east-wing bedroom.
opens_with: Elara arriving by taxi through fog and salt rain to a decaying Art Deco estate.
core_tension: Elara senses the house and family are performing grief while hiding coordinated lies.
key_events: Victor greets Elara with uncanny certainty and evasive references to the past.
Family introduced in the foyer; Clara weaponizes Elara's status and tensions surface.
Ethan watches Elara while unconsciously touching his left wrist.
Storm and saltwater pressure the east wing as the mansion groans like a living thing.
Elara hears heartbeat-like thumps in the walls tied to Amelia's final warning.
ends_with: In her room, Elara presses her ear to cold plaster and hears the house exhale.
continuity_flags: Elara does not yet know her biological link to Amelia.
James and Ines display restrained, suspicious body language toward Rui.
The wall heartbeat remains unexplained in chapter 1.
